message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "pub.com" as pub_com
participant "prebid.js" as prebid_js
participant "prebid_[SSP_MODULE].js" as prebid_ssp_module
participant "SSPs" as ssps
participant "DSPs" as dsp
participant "gam.js" as gam
participant "GAM/AdX" as gam_adx

User -> pub_com : 1. navigates browser to pub.com
pub_com -> prebid_js : 2. load, configure, execute prebid.js
prebid_js -> prebid_ssp_module : 3. invoke SSP bid adapter
prebid_ssp_module -> ssps : 4. ad request
ssps -> dsp : 5. traffic quality controls
dsp -> ssps : 6. make bid requests
ssps -> gam : 7. respond with bids
gam -> ssps : 8. pub ad controls
ssps -> prebid_js : 9. ad w/price
prebid_js -> pub_com : 10. ad w/price
pub_com -> prebid_js : 11. select appropriate ad
prebid_js -> pub_com : 12. configure k/v pair for selected ad
pub_com -> gam : 13. wait for ad slot to load

note over pub_com, gam
At this point control over the ad loading process is transferred from Prebid.js to GAM (final selection layer)
@endnote

pub_com -> gam : 14. load slot
gam -> gam_adx : 15. ad request
gam_adx -> gam : 16. respond with winning ad, which may be prebid.js line item

alt [GAM/AdX highest bid]
gam -> gam_adx : 17.1 render GAM/AdX result
gam_adx -> gam : 17.2 render selected SSP ad
end

gam -> pub_com : 18. show highest value advertisement

@enduml
